name: Recruiter: compose bulk InMail — STOP before send (snapshot)
description: SAFE preview: selects the project's ACTIVE candidates, opens the bulk InMail composer, types the body, and STOPS. Clicks NO Send button at all (not even the subject-reveal Send #1). With snapshot:true the final step captures the composer so a human can verify the recipient(s) + message before any real send. Params: pipeline_url, body.

selector_chain.value: Compose a message or draft with AI

steps.intent: settle after body (STOP — no Send click)
